caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a podcast or radio studio, set within a clothing store. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "YOU NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The man is engaged in conversation, speaking into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him, the walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. A mannequin dressed in casual attire stands in the background, along with racks of clothes and shelves displaying various items. The setting suggests a casual yet professional atmosphere, likely for a talk show or podcast recording. The man's animated expression and body language indicate he is actively participating in an engaging discussion.
